rationale: Review 1 correctly identifies that the `simp` call in `fiberHomeomorph` (line 73 of Deck.lean) does non-trivial work—closing a fibre-invariance goal via `map_proj`—while relying on the default simp set for `Set.mem_singleton_iff`. Swapping to `simp only` with explicit lemmas makes the proof more robust and its dependencies explicit, which is a genuine (if modest) proof-quality improvement. Review 2 missed this.
